project_description: Migration of 8 services from bare metal to Kubernetes (on-premise). Containerization (Dockerfile for each service), Helm charts, Ingress/NetworkPolicy configuration, persistent volumes for stateful services, CI/CD pipeline (GitLab CI → ArgoCD), monitoring (Prometheus + Grafana), load testing after migration.
client_history: Client had 3 services on K8s (360h). Now scaling to whole organization.
risk_patterns: Stateful services (databases) in K8s require special attention on storage and backup.
pm_comment: Persistent volumes and stateful workload backup took 30% of project — well estimated.
